title: Anju Sundarikal
desc: Five friends settle into a strict hostel, unaware of its grim past. Their mischievous plan to shelter a mysterious guest backfires, unleashing a series of strange incidents.

title: Amme Mookambike
desc: After being abandoned at the temple as a child, Sauparnika is raised by Surendran as a florist. However, her reputation for answered prayers shifts when Sandeep enters her life.

title: One Man Show
desc: Jayakrishnan participates in a game show for life-changing riches, but when the host digs deeper, he shares his tragic life story.

title: Mangalyam Thanthunanena
desc: Nidhi, a fearless and kind-hearted young woman, marries her soulmate Gowtham. However, soon she finds herself in the middle of family conspiracies aimed at tearing them apart.

title: Chattambi Paaru
desc: Despite coming from a family experiencing financial hardship, Parvati valiantly sets out on her own to build a life and support her family.

title: Peythozhiyathe
desc: Despite her warmth and courage, Charulatha yearns for love to escape her estranged father and cruel stepmother in a tumultuous household.

title: Swayamvarapanthal
desc: Nandini, a devoted village girl, crosses paths with Surya, whose resentment toward his mother drives him to pursue a relationship with her.

title: Amar Akbar Anthony
desc: Amar, Akbar and Anthony are bachelors who are struggling to earn a living. When they learn that their neighbour Fathima has been mysteriously murdered, they set out in search of the criminal.

title: Angu Vaikundapurathu
desc: A man grows up in a disdainful household and lands a job at a travel agency. But when he realises that he was switched from his real family at birth, several events occur.

title: Ayyappanum Koshiyum
desc: Ayyappan, a police officer, is an upright man who always strives to do the right thing. However, things change when a retired army havildar, Koshy, settles in his village and the two egos clash.

title: Retro
desc: A gangster promises to stop leading a violent life upon his wife's request. However, walking away from the past proves to be more difficult than he expected.

title: Megham
desc: Colonel Ravi Varma Thampuran falls in love with Meenakshi but realises that she is in love with Mani, his subordinate. Thus, he decides to unite them in spite of the opposition from their families.
